name: Millet-Cauliflower Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Head of cauliflower (very coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a soup pot and toast millet until golden brown and beginning to pop. Remove from heat, add 1-1/2 cups water, bring to a boil, and simmer for 20 minutes.
2. In a medium skillet, heat oil and saute celery, green pepper, onion, garlic, and carrot until the onion is translucent.
3. To the millet pot, add 6 cups water (for thick soup), cauliflower, bay leaf, sauteed mixture, soup base, and herbs and celery seed. Simmer for 20 minutes.
4. In a blender, process miso, cashews, 1 cup water, and yeast. Add to the soup and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Taste for salt and adjust consistency with more water if desired.
